description: A designed meme image posted by the official White House account attacking Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell. At the top is a screenshotted/embedded Truth Social or Twitter post header reading 'Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump' with the quoted text '“Too Late” is a DISASTER for America! Interest Rates too high!' ('Too Late' being Trump's recurring derisive nickname for Powell). The main visual is a photo-manipulation: a man in a dark business suit (representing Jerome Powell, labeled with large white sans-serif text 'Jerome Powell') is depicted mid-air, arms and legs flailing, captured in the act of being thrown into or falling backward into a green metal commercial dumpster sitting against a plain concrete/brick wall. The composition is a classic internet 'tossed in the dumpster' / 'dumpster fire' visual gag, implying Powell and his interest-rate policy are garbage to be discarded. Style is a crude but deliberate digital photo composite (cutout figure pasted over a stock dumpster photo) typical of political meme culture. The propaganda technique is ridicule and dehumanization of a policy opponent through a humiliating visual metaphor; target audience is online MAGA supporters and economic-policy critics of the Fed. The tweet caption reads 'TOO LATE POWELL.'
notable_text: TOO LATE POWELL. / “Too Late” is a DISASTER for America! Interest Rates too high! / Jerome Powell
